phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus stop to city center is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la parada del autobús al centro?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh ehs-TAH lah pah-RAH-dah dehl ow-toh-BOOS ahl SEHN-troh?

likely_response.local: Fuera de llegadas, parada exterior número tres.
likely_response.pronunciation: foo-EH-rah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs pah-RAH-dah ehks-teh-ree-OHR NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
likely_response.translation_en: Outside arrivals, external stop number three.

responses.english: Outside arrivals, external stop number three.
responses.phonetic: foo-EH-rah DEH yeh-GAH-dahs pah-RAH-dah ehks-teh-ree-OHR NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
responses.french: Fuera de llegadas, parada exterior número tres.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the check-in counter for a specific airline is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está el mostrador de facturación de Iberia?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAH el mos-trah-DOR deh fak-too-rah-SYOHN deh ee-BEH-ree-ah?

likely_response.local: Planta 1, módulo B, junto a seguridad.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah MÓ-doo-loh B HOON-toh AH seh-g-ree-DAHD
likely_response.translation_en: Upper floor, module B, check screens.

responses.english: Upper floor, module B, check screens.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah MÓ-doo-loh B HOON-toh AH seh-g-ree-DAHD
responses.french: Planta 1, módulo B, junto a seguridad.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is located
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar la parada de taxis?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kon-TRAR lah pah-RAH-dah deh TAHK-sees

likely_response.local: Fuera de la terminal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Outside the terminal, on the right.

responses.english: Outside the terminal, on the right.
responses.phonetic: foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Fuera de la terminal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to report lost luggage
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reporto el extravío de mi equipaje?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh reh-pohr-TOH el ehs-trah-VEE-oh deh mee eh-kee-PAH-heh?

likely_response.local: Diríjase a la oficina de objetos perdidos en llegadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AH LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH ohb-HEH-tohs pehr-DEE-dohs EHN yeh-GAH-dahs
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the lost property office in arrivals.

responses.english: Go to the lost property office in arrivals.
responses.phonetic: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AH LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH ohb-HEH-tohs pehr-DEE-dohs EHN yeh-GAH-dahs
responses.french: Diríjase a la oficina de objetos perdidos en llegadas.
